title: Saddles!
description: This mod allow saddles to be crafted in a vanilla-friendly way. Server side only!
body:
## Saddles!

Saddles! is a Fabric mod which allows players to craft saddles in a vanilla-styled recipe - only 5 leather pieces and 3 iron ingots.

Sources: [GitHub](https://github.com/Chamosio/Saddles-Fabric-1.21.5.git)
